description: Engine-compatible attribution graph for 川渝大区供应链. Each node has metric_sql + threshold for Plan-Execute-Reflect reasoning.

scenarios.title: 外调品归因
scenarios.description: 外调品占比异常 → 库存告急 → 产量不足

nodes.label: 外调品占比
nodes.metric_sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN is_external_transfer=1 THEN deliv_qty_mt ELSE 0 END)/NULLIF(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),0),1) AS value FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='{current_period}' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL
nodes.threshold_desc: 外调占比超过 40% 视为异常

nodes.label: 库存告急数量
nodes.metric_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM sales_order WHERE order_dlvry_sts_code IN ('01','02') AND strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date)='{current_period}'
nodes.threshold_desc: 未完成订单超过 30 条视为库存告急

nodes.label: 计划达成率
nodes.metric_sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(actual_qty)/NULLIF(SUM(plan_qty),0),1) AS value FROM rolling_plan WHERE stats_yearmth='{current_period}'
nodes.threshold_desc: 计划达成率低于 85% 视为产量不足

scenarios.title: 销量达成归因
scenarios.description: 整体达成率低 → 订单倒挂 → 渠道结构问题

nodes.label: 整体达成率
nodes.metric_sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(d.deliv_qty_mt)/NULLIF(SUM(p.plan_qty),0),1) AS value FROM sales_delivery d JOIN rolling_plan p ON strftime('%Y%m', d.deliv_crt_time)=p.stats_yearmth AND d.brnch_code=p.brnch_code AND d.busline_code=p.busline_code WHERE p.stats_yearmth='{current_period}' AND d.deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL
nodes.threshold_desc: 整体达成率低于 90% 视为异常

nodes.label: 订单倒挂率
nodes.metric_sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN order_dlvry_sts_code IN ('01','02') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1) AS value FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date)='{current_period}'
nodes.threshold_desc: 未完成订单占比超过 20% 视为倒挂严重

nodes.label: 渠道集中度
nodes.metric_sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN chnl_descrptn='流通' THEN deliv_qty_mt ELSE 0 END)/NULLIF(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),0),1) AS value FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='{current_period}' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL
nodes.threshold_desc: 流通渠道占比超过 70% 视为渠道过于集中

scenarios.title: 月末挤水归因
scenarios.description: 月末订单异常集中 → 实际发货滞后

nodes.label: 月末3天订单占比
nodes.metric_sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(strftime('%d', order_crt_date) AS INTEGER) >= 28 THEN order_qty_mt ELSE 0 END)/NULLIF(SUM(order_qty_mt),0),1) AS value FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date)='{current_period}'
nodes.threshold_desc: 月末3天订单量占月度超过 35% 视为挤水

nodes.label: 未发货订单占比
nodes.metric_sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN order_dlvry_sts_code='01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1) AS value FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date)='{current_period}'
nodes.threshold_desc: 未发货订单超过 15% 视为交付滞后
